rationale: Evaluated 5 finalist models across 4 stages (stratified select, pilot 10 issues, full eval 20 issues). Finalist A (deepseek-r1-distill-llama-70b): best value at 50% accuracy / $0.0001 per call. Finalist B (deepseek-4-flash): highest accuracy at 70% (macro F1 0.281). The two represent a meaningful production trade-off: value vs quality ceiling.
